blockers: A hidden repo-local .codex directory could not be created in this sandbox, so tracked skills live in the top-level skills directory instead.
next_action: Use these skills in future repo work and add more only when a repeated workflow proves worth standardizing, especially as sandboxed agent contracts and orchestration paths become concrete.
handoff_rules: Read the plan before editing files.
Keep skill metadata concise and trigger-oriented.
Do not add auxiliary README files inside skill folders.
